Description
Agrimmonia Aiwaza is a college student with a unique appearance. She is trans-female and lesbian, with pale skin, dusty red eyes, and long deep brunette hair styled in a himecut trim. She has a prominent ahoge and a skull hair clip on one side. Her outfit consists of a white shirt, dark burgundy shorts with a dusty red stripe, matching suspenders, and a large cape resembling a gakuran jacket with an inner red hue diamond pattern. She also wears brown thigh-high socks and dark burgundy shoes.

silly aiwaza XP
